This will involve defining schemas for incoming request bodies/parameters (e.g., using Joi or Zod) and validating requests before they reach the controllers, providing clean error messages for invalid input.","needsHuman":false,"reason":"A standard API response format has been implemented using a dedicated middleware. This middleware intercepts responses, wraps successful data in a consistent JSON structure { status: 'success', data: ... } or { status: 'success', message: ... }, and ensures all API endpoints return data in a predictable and consumable format. This enhances API usability, consistency, and simplifies frontend integration. The middleware is applied globally in `index.js` after all routes but before the error handler, ensuring it only processes successful responses."}
